name: fast-varint-codec
description: High-performance variable-length integer codec using fixed sizes (1, 2, 4, 8 bytes). The first 2 bits encode length, enabling fast, branch-efficient decoding. Uses simple bitwise ops and BigInt for 64-bit support. Matches low-level performance (comparable to C++) while staying simple and predictable.
author: Yevhenii Yusenkov
